title: TechCorp Compliance Summary - Acme Corp Vendor Assessment
body:
## Compliance Posture Overview

TechCorp maintains a comprehensive information security and compliance program designed to protect customer data and meet industry standards. This summary provides Acme Corp with public-facing information regarding our certifications, audit schedule, and data residency practices.

## Certifications and Standards

TechCorp holds the following industry-recognized security certifications:

- **SOC 2 Type II Attestation**: Our system and organization controls have been independently audited and verified to meet SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria, including Security, Availability, Processing Integrity, Confidentiality, and Privacy. This attestation is issued by a licensed CPA firm and demonstrates the operating effectiveness of our security controls over a defined review period.

- **ISO/IEC 27001 Certification**: TechCorp maintains active ISO 27001 certification, confirming compliance with international information security management system (ISMS) requirements. This certification is maintained through an accredited external certification body and demonstrates our commitment to systematic security management across the organization.

## Audit Schedule

TechCorp operates on a regular audit cycle to maintain compliance and demonstrate continuous improvement:

- **SOC 2 Type II**: Annual attestation audits are conducted to provide current operating effectiveness data. Our current attestation covers a 12-month review period, with updated reports issued annually.

- **ISO 27001**: Surveillance audits are conducted annually to validate continued operational compliance. Recertification audits occur every three years to assess full compliance with the ISO 27001 standard. Our most recent certification cycle commenced in 2024, with scheduled recertification review in 2027.
